description: Use this API routine to change the GNE device name of the specified GNE device. This API routine was first introduced in release 32.0.2. ierr = mbidgne(name, namnew)

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the gne device for which the gne device name is to be changed. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: namnew
parameters.description: New name to be assigned to the gne device. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: a non-blank new identifier must be specified.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
